signal: Feed scoring subagent invented own 0-100 four-dimension framework (技术创新/实用/影响力/时效) instead of SKILL.md's three-dimension weighted system (信息增量 35% + 内容质量 35% + 实用价值 30%). Output format also wrong (not BEGIN_JSON/END_JSON).
action: Added anti-hallucination guard to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.12.1: explicit constraint that subagent MUST use only the three named dimensions from SKILL.md, with mandatory scoreBreakdown format. Also added rejection rule: main agent must reject non-conforming subagent output.

signal: Cron prompt vs SKILL.md contradiction pattern: v1.12.0 Tier removal exposed that cron prompt had stale 'prioritize Tier 1+2, skip Tier 3-5' instructions contradicting SKILL.md. Agent executes cron prompt over SKILL.md, so stale prompts override correct skill docs.
action: Added 'Cron Prompt ↔ SKILL.md Sync Rules' guardrail to cron-best-practices.md: 4-point checklist for post-SKILL.md-update prompt review. Principle: cron prompt accuracy is MORE critical than SKILL.md because it's the direct input.

signal: Feed collection duplicate file numbering: multiple runs/day produce overlapping NNN-slug.md files (001, 002, 003, 005 all have duplicates on 2026-03-17). Each run restarts from 001 instead of continuing from max existing.
action: Added numbering continuation rule to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.12.2: check existing files, start from max+1.

signal: scoreBreakdown field still missing in articles despite v1.12.1 anti-hallucination guard. 12/15 articles on 2026-03-17 lack scoreBreakdown. Guard exists but main agent or subagent still drops the field.
action: Added required-field completeness check to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.12.2 Step 7: mandatory check for scoreBreakdown presence + format before git commit.
